projectDescription: An agentic skills framework that gives coding agents a structured software development methodology — covering design, planning, TDD, debugging, and code review — through composable skills that trigger automatically.
keyFeatures: Composable skills library that triggers automatically based on task context
Structured brainstorming workflow that produces validated design specs before any code is written
Bite-sized implementation plan generation with exact file paths and complete code examples
Subagent-driven development with two-stage review (spec compliance, then code quality)
Strict Red-Green-Refactor TDD enforcement with deletion of code written before tests
4-phase systematic debugging process that mandates root cause investigation before any fix
Multi-platform support: Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, and Gemini CLI
Plugin marketplace integration for one-command install on supported platforms
publicApiSurface: skills/brainstorming — Socratic design refinement before any implementation
skills/writing-plans — Detailed TDD-first implementation plan generation
skills/executing-plans — Batch plan execution with human checkpoints
skills/subagent-driven-development — Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review
skills/verification-before-completion — Fix verification before declaring success
skills/requesting-code-review — Pre-review checklist and review dispatch
skills/receiving-code-review — Structured response to review feedback
skills/using-git-worktrees — Isolated parallel development branch setup
skills/writing-skills — Guide for creating new skills following best practices
skills/using-superpowers — Entry point skill establishing session-wide skill usage rules
commands/brainstorm — Slash command to invoke brainstorming skill
commands/write-plan — Slash command to invoke writing-plans skill
commands/execute-plan — Slash command to invoke executing-plans skill
agents/code-reviewer — Reusable code reviewer agent definition
